name: ziplink-cli
description: CLI tool for shortening URLs with a fixed Vercel backend and .env support.

scripts.build-all: GOOS=darwin GOARCH=amd64 go build -o bin/ziplink-darwin-amd64 . && GOOS=darwin GOARCH=arm64 go build -o bin/ziplink-darwin-arm64 . && GOOS=linux GOARCH=amd64 go build -o bin/ziplink-linux-amd64 . && GOOS=windows GOARCH=amd64 go build -o bin/ziplink-windows-amd64.exe .
scripts.deploy: npm run build-all && npm version patch && npm publish --access public

author: Deepak Negi
